Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 16/02/2024
As the vibrant festivities of Chinese New Year unfurl, painting the world with the auspicious hues of red and gold, we wish to extend our heartfelt greetings to you
Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
10 February 2024 - 16 February 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
As the vibrant festivities of Chinese New Year unfurl, painting the world with the auspicious hues of red and gold, we wish to extend our heartfelt greetings
to you. May the Lunar New Year usher in a period of unparalleled prosperity, health, and happiness, illuminating your journey with success and fortitude. The ship recycling sectors across India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, and Turkiye are experiencing varying degrees of market stagnation and operational challenges.
